app.name: cleanline
app.promise: Photographs a hand-drawn sketch and traces it to clean, editable vector paths (SVG/PDF) via on-device Vision.
app.target_user: Illustrators/print-on-demand sellers who sketch on paper but need vector output.
app.one_sentence_promise: Photographs a hand-drawn sketch and traces it to clean, editable vector paths (SVG/PDF) via on-device Vision.
